chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP NO.D-3541/2021 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For order on CMA No.19894/21 2. For order on CMA No.18444/21 3. For order on office objection. 4. For hearing on CMA No.14789/21 5. For of main case. 01.09.2021 Mr. Muhammad Nishat Warsi, DAG................ Mr. Mukesh Kumar Karara files statement on behalf of respondents No.2 to 4, taken on record. He seeks time to file comments. Associate of Mr. Muhammad Shabbir Shaikh contends that name of her senior is reflecting in the cause list whereas he has no concern with this petition. Accordingly office shall be careful in future. Issue notice on contempt application. J U D G E J U D G E IK
